summary.zh-CN: 变更说明: 新增每日与全局成就追踪，覆盖设置页、状态栏与战报，并支持成就快照的实时更新。
summary.en: Change Summary: Added daily and global achievement tracking across settings, status surfaces, and battle reports, with real-time achievement snapshot updates.

bodyHtml.zh-CN:
产品改进

每日与全局成就追踪

  • 变更说明: 新增每日与全局成就追踪，覆盖设置页、状态栏与战报，并支持成就快照的实时更新。
  • 影响范围: 影响 成就与进度反馈、reports 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续使用现有入口即可，升级到该版本后相关改进会自动生效。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

OmniRoute 集成

  • 变更说明: 新增 OmniRoute 集成，覆盖系统与英雄配置，包含设置项、模型目录支持和状态指示。
  • 影响范围: 影响 omniroute 相关功能、heroes 相关功能、角色与职业元数据。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

系统历史时间线

  • 变更说明: 新增系统历史时间线，并扩展了会话状态展示，补充并发与执行器相关状态信息。
  • 影响范围: 影响 timeline 相关功能、concurrency 相关功能、会话流程。
  • 使用方式: 继续使用现有入口即可，升级到该版本后相关改进会自动生效。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

问题修复

存档数据处理

  • 变更说明: 改进了存档数据处理，新增存档布局解析与迁移支持，以适配运行时数据结构演进。
  • 影响范围: 影响 save 相关功能、data 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

将 HagiPower 行为调整为共享池模型

  • 变更说明: 将 HagiPower 行为调整为共享池模型，移除了按英雄维度的余额与报表路径。
  • 影响范围: 影响 hagipower 相关功能、hagicode-core 相关功能、heroes 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

提供商错误重试配置

  • 变更说明: 新增提供商错误重试配置，并补充相关设置与服务映射中的错误处理更新。
  • 影响范围: 影响 settings 相关功能、ai 相关功能、services 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。
bodyHtml.en:
Product Improvements

Daily and global achievement tracking

  • Change Summary: Added daily and global achievement tracking across settings, status surfaces, and battle reports, with real-time achievement snapshot updates.
  • Impact: Affects achievements and progress feedback, Reports.
  • How to Use: Keep using the existing daily and global achievement tracking entry points; the improved behavior appears automatically after upgrading to this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

OmniRoute integration

  • Change Summary: Added OmniRoute integration across system and hero configuration, including settings, model catalog support, and a status indicator.
  • Impact: Affects Omniroute, Heroes, hero and role metadata.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

A historical system timeline

  • Change Summary: Added a historical system timeline and expanded session status displays, including concurrency and executor-related status details.
  • Impact: Affects Timeline, Concurrency, session workflows.
  • How to Use: Keep using the existing a historical system timeline entry points; the improved behavior appears automatically after upgrading to this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Fixes

Save-data handling

  • Change Summary: Improved save-data handling with a save layout resolver and migration support for evolving runtime data layouts.
  • Impact: Affects Save, Data.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

HagiPower behavior

  • Change Summary: Updated HagiPower behavior to the shared-pool model, removing hero-bound balance and reporting paths.
  • Impact: Affects Hagipower, Hagicode Core, API and generated contract surfaces.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Provider error retry configuration

  • Change Summary: Added provider error retry configuration and related error-handling updates in settings and service mappings.
  • Impact: Affects Settings, Ai, Services.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.
